artifact.name: BD_05_INTERNAL_WORKBENCH_ACTION_BOARD_BACKLOG.json
artifact.title: Internal workbench and action board as real process workspace

ticket_contract.work_type: UX Refactor / Work Queue / Role Tasking
ticket_contract.unique_shape: Operational workspace ticket; driven by task queues and decision readiness, not page decoration.
ticket_contract.execution_decision: Derive backlog after BD-04 lifecycle states are stable.

source_evidence.role: Stable evidence lifecycle and sufficiency states that drive the action board taxonomy.
Existing internal workbench, advisor queue and compliance queue surfaces.
Typed signal/workbench lifecycle functions for signal intake, triage, evidence-gap routing, action item state and no-auto-advice proof.
Existing process proof for workbench queue/action states, evidence request routing and no client-visible advice.
Existing density/page-type proof that /advisory/review-queue is a productive workbench.
Existing navigation proof for Internal workbench route access.

non_negotiable_rules: Every visible primary action must either have a typed handler plus permission/state transition plan or be rendered as a clearly blocked/static affordance with no interactive action semantics.
Queue row selection can route to detail, but cannot mutate release, export, evidence sufficiency or client visibility.
Bulk actions are out of P0 unless every selected row shares the same handler, permission, object scope and precondition profile.
Action board labels must use BD-04 lifecycle language; generic 'approved' or 'ready' labels are forbidden without the scoped gate source.
Admin/security actions remain governance-only under DG-02 and cannot appear as evidence sufficiency or release actions.

existing_ui_inventory.current_strength: Has WorksurfaceShell, queue cards, density contract and no release/export/client visibility safety note.
existing_ui_inventory.gap: High-level demo metrics and queue cards are not yet a canonical task board backed by a shared task taxonomy.

existing_ui_inventory.current_strength: Shows active task, guarded action rail, blocker, evidence gaps and route-to-advisor handler.
existing_ui_inventory.gap: Request evidence primary action is represented in the workbench panel but the canonical board contract must bind it to typed evidence request handlers.

existing_ui_inventory.current_strength: Queue row actions route to detail and explicitly do not approve/release/export/client-visibility.
existing_ui_inventory.gap: Export and bulk action affordances are held/static and should not be promoted to P0 until typed handlers exist.

existing_ui_inventory.current_strength: Queue routes to decision-room detail and clearly separates queue visibility from release/block/request evidence actions.
existing_ui_inventory.gap: Refresh/export held controls must either receive typed handlers or be removed from P0 acceptance.

existing_ui_inventory.current_strength: Policy/scope/audit constraints visible; admin non-bypass safety note.
existing_ui_inventory.gap: Belongs to DG-02 governance non-bypass, not BD-05 evidence/advisory core board unless shared board primitive is extracted.

queue_state_proof.proof: P44 signal intake creates Trigger + QueueItem + AuditEvent with clientVisible=false.
P44 workbench triage routes to advisor/review/awaiting-info/blocked states with audit and no client release.
Evidence gap routing creates or blocks an evidence request and does not create autonomous advice/client visibility.
Navigation exposes Internal workbench route under Advisory Workbench.

derived_implementation_backlog.title: Extract canonical ProcessActionBoard model
derived_implementation_backlog.scope: Create a typed board taxonomy/model that consumes BD-04 lifecycle states, queue items and role/action permissions.
derived_implementation_backlog.acceptance: Every board item maps to objectType, status, evidenceLifecycleState, assignedRoleKey, blocker and nextAction.

derived_implementation_backlog.title: Replace duplicated Phase4WorkbenchPanel copies with shared component
derived_implementation_backlog.scope: Unify identical workbench triad components across internal, governance and ops surfaces.
derived_implementation_backlog.acceptance: One shared component enforces queue/context/action-rail/safety-note contract.

derived_implementation_backlog.title: Bind Request Evidence action to typed BD-04/P44 handler
derived_implementation_backlog.scope: Where a primary action says Request evidence, it must call a typed evidence request command or be non-interactive and explicitly blocked.
derived_implementation_backlog.acceptance: No interactive Request Evidence CTA appears without handler, permission, audit and noClientRelease safety envelope.

derived_implementation_backlog.title: Demote held export/bulk/refresh controls from P0 board acceptance
derived_implementation_backlog.scope: Held controls remain static or are removed until typed handlers exist.
derived_implementation_backlog.acceptance: No static held control is counted as process capability or acceptance evidence.

derived_implementation_backlog.title: Create board-state source contract test
derived_implementation_backlog.scope: Test that action board columns and actions map to real WorkflowStatus/EvidenceStatus/PermissionAction values.
derived_implementation_backlog.acceptance: Contract fails if a board action lacks handler/permission/state transition plan.

derived_implementation_backlog.title: Runtime screenshot proof after actual UI refactor
derived_implementation_backlog.scope: Only after UI changes, capture /advisory/review-queue and trigger detail with proof-eligible source state.
derived_implementation_backlog.acceptance: Screenshot shows real board taxonomy, action rail and blockers without overlapping UI or overclaim copy.

not_p0_or_remove_from_acceptance.reason: No shared handler/object-scope/precondition model; keep static or remove from P0 acceptance.

not_p0_or_remove_from_acceptance.surface_or_action: Export held controls inside advisory/compliance queues
not_p0_or_remove_from_acceptance.reason: Export belongs to export lifecycle and must not be implied by queue visibility.
Operational metrics are useful only when they route to real queue states and blockers.

not_p0_or_remove_from_acceptance.surface_or_action: Generic action board labels such as Ready or Approved
not_p0_or_remove_from_acceptance.reason: BD-04 requires scoped lifecycle names and sufficiency decision source.

bold_cleanup_recommendations: Stop carrying multiple local Phase4WorkbenchPanel clones; extract one canonical board primitive or delete the clones.
Remove held export/bulk controls from P0 acceptance instead of polishing them as fake capability.
Move from route/page-specific demo rows to a typed process-action-board model fed by QueueItem, Trigger, ActionItem, EvidenceRecord and Journey state.
Make disabled/held controls fail acceptance if they look like working actions without handler, permission, state transition and audit plan.
Prefer fewer real actions over many impressive-looking static controls.

implementation_decision.rationale: BD-05 is explicitly plan-first. Existing UI and services provide enough proof to derive the backlog, but real UI refactor should be a follow-on implementation slice with screenshot proof.

commands_run.result: 6 board columns, 5 role rows, 6 derived backlog items

commands_run.command: pnpm playwright test tests/p44-phase4-certification.spec.ts tests/true-ux-density.spec.ts tests/navigation-shell.spec.ts --workers=1
